# NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                         | Function Name            | HTTP Method | Template File                | Context Variables (name: type)                                                                                                                             | Form Data (POST routes)                          |
|----------------------------------|--------------------------|-------------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| /                                | redirect_to_dashboard    | GET         | N/A (redirect)                | None                                                                                                                                                       | None                                            |
| /dashboard                       | dashboard                | GET         | dashboard.html               | featured_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, excerpt:str),                                                                                        |
|                                  |                          |             |                              | Note: featured_articles contains article summaries for featured display.                                                                                     |                                                 |
| /catalog                        | article_catalog          | GET         | article_catalog.html         | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, category:str, thumbnail_url:str),
  categories: list of dict (category_id:int, category_name:str)                                    |                                                 |
| /catalog/search                 | search_results           | POST        | search_results.html          | query: str,
  results: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, excerpt:str)                                                                                       | search_query: str (from form input named 'search_query')                      |
| /article/<int:article_id>       | article_details          | GET         | article_details.html         | article: dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, content:str),
  is_bookmarked: bool                                                                                               |                                                 |
| /article/<int:article_id>/bookmark | bookmark_article       | POST        | N/A (redirect back to article_details) | None                                                                                                                                                       | No explicit form data; request triggers bookmarking article_id                    |
| /bookmarks                     | bookmarks                | GET         | bookmarks.html               | bookmarks: list of dict (bookmark_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, bookmarked_date:str)                                                         |                                                 |
| /bookmark/<int:bookmark_id>/remove | remove_bookmark        | POST        | N/A (redirect back to bookmarks) | None                                                                                                                                                       | No explicit form data; request triggers removal of bookmark with bookmark_id       |
| /comment                       | comments                 | GET         | comments.html                | comments: list of dict (comment_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, commenter_name:str, comment_text:str, comment_date:str),
  articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)                   |                                                 |
| /comment/write                 | write_comment            | GET         | write_comment.html           | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)                                                                                                       |                                                 |
| /comment/write                 | submit_comment           | POST        | N/A (redirect to /comment)  | None                                                                                                                                                       | article_id: int (dropdown selection), commenter_name: str (input), comment_text: str (textarea) |
| /trending                     | trending_articles        | GET         | trending.html                | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int),
  time_period: str (current filter)                                                    |                                                 |
| /trending/filter              | filter_trending          | POST        | trending.html                | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int),
  time_period: str (selected filter from dropdown)                                    | time_period: str (dropdown selection: Today, This Week, This Month)                |
| /category/<category_name>       | category_articles        | GET         | category.html                | category_name: str,
  articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)                                                        |                                                 |
| /category/<category_name>/sort  | sort_category_articles  | POST        | category.html                | category_name: str,
  sort_by: str ("date" or "popularity"),
  articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)           | sort_by: str (from button indicating sorting criteria)                             |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. Dashboard Page
- File path: templates/dashboard.html
- Page title: News Portal
- <title> tag: "News Portal"
- <h1> tag: "News Portal"
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page - Div - Container for the dashboard page
  - ID: featured-articles - Div - Display of featured article recommendations
  - ID: browse-articles-button - Button - Navigates to Article Catalog page
  - ID: view-bookmarks-button - Button - Navigates to Bookmarks page
  - ID: trending-articles-button - Button - Navigates to Trending Articles page
- Context Variables:
  - featured_articles: list of dict with fields article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, excerpt:str
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-articles-button: url_for('article_catalog')
  - view-bookmarks-button: url_for('bookmarks')
  - trending-articles-button: url_for('trending_articles')

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- File path: templates/article_catalog.html
- Page title: Article Catalog
- <title> tag: "Article Catalog"
- <h1> tag: "Article Catalog"
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page - Div - Container for the catalog page
  - ID: search-input - Input - Text input for searching articles by title, author, or keywords
  - ID: category-filter - Dropdown - Select category filter
  - ID: articles-grid - Div - Grid displaying article cards
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} - Button - View details button for each article
- Context Variables:
  - articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, category:str, thumbnail_url:str)
  - categories: list of dict (category_id:int, category_name:str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)

### 3. Article Details Page
- File path: templates/article_details.html
- Page title: Article Details
- <title> tag: "Article Details"
- <h1> tag: "Article Details"
- Elements:
  - ID: article-details-page - Div - Container for article details
  - ID: article-title - H1 - Displays article title
  - ID: article-author - Div - Displays article author
  - ID: article-date - Div - Displays article publication date
  - ID: bookmark-button - Button - Bookmark the article
  - ID: article-content - Div - Full article content
- Context Variables:
  - article: dict with fields article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, content:str
  - is_bookmarked: bool
- Navigation Mappings:
  - bookmark-button: form POST to url_for('bookmark_article', article_id=article.article_id)

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- File path: templates/bookmarks.html
- Page title: My Bookmarks
- <title> tag: "My Bookmarks"
- <h1> tag: "My Bookmarks"
- Elements:
  - ID: bookmarks-page - Div - Container for bookmarks page
  - ID: bookmarks-list - Div - List of bookmarked articles
  - ID pattern: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} - Button - Remove bookmark
  - ID pattern: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} - Button - Read the bookmarked article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Button - Navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - bookmarks: list of dict (bookmark_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, bookmarked_date:str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: form POST to url_for('remove_bookmark', bookmark_id=bookmark_id)
  - read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=corresponding article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 5. Comments Page
- File path: templates/comments.html
- Page title: Article Comments
- <title> tag: "Article Comments"
- <h1> tag: "Article Comments"
- Elements:
  - ID: comments-page - Div - Container for comments page
  - ID: comments-list - Div - List of all comments
  - ID: write-comment-button - Button - Navigate to Write Comment page
  - ID: filter-by-article - Dropdown - Filter comments by article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Button - Navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - comments: list of dict (comment_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, commenter_name:str, comment_text:str, comment_date:str)
  - articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - write-comment-button: url_for('write_comment')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 6. Write Comment Page
- File path: templates/write_comment.html
- Page title: Write a Comment
- <title> tag: "Write a Comment"
- <h1> tag: "Write a Comment"
- Elements:
  - ID: write-comment-page - Div - Container for write comment page
  - ID: select-article - Dropdown - Select article to comment on
  - ID: commenter-name - Input - Input for commenter name
  - ID: comment-text - Textarea - Input for comment text
  - ID: submit-comment-button - Button - Submit comment
- Context Variables:
  - articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - form POST to url_for('submit_comment')

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- File path: templates/trending.html
- Page title: Trending Articles
- <title> tag: "Trending Articles"
- <h1> tag: "Trending Articles"
- Elements:
  - ID: trending-page - Div - Container for trending articles page
  - ID: trending-list - Div - Ranked list of trending articles
  - ID: time-period-filter - Dropdown - Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month)
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} - Button - View article details
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Button - Navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int)
  - time_period: str
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 8. Category Page
- File path: templates/category.html
- Page title: Category Articles
- <title> tag: "Category Articles"
- <h1> tag: "Category Articles"
- Elements:
  - ID: category-page - Div - Container for category page
  - ID: category-title - H1 - Displays category name
  - ID: category-articles - Div - Lists articles in category
  - ID: sort-by-date - Button - Sort articles by date
  - ID: sort-by-popularity - Button - Sort articles by popularity
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Button - Navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - category_name: str
  - articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - sort-by-date: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by="date"
  - sort-by-popularity: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by="popularity"
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 9. Search Results Page
- File path: templates/search_results.html
- Page title: Search Results
- <title> tag: "Search Results"
- <h1> tag: "Search Results"
- Elements:
  - ID: search-results-page - Div - Container for search results
  - ID: search-query-display - Div - Displays the search query
  - ID: results-list - Div - List of search result articles
  - ID: no-results-message - Div - Displayed when no results found
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Button - Navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - query: str
  - results: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, excerpt:str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Articles Data
- File path: data/articles.txt
- Format: pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields in order:
  1. article_id (int)
  2. title (str)
  3. author (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. content (str)
  6. date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
  7. views (int)
- Description: Stores all news articles with details.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- File path: data/categories.txt
- Format: pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields in order:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
- Description: Stores categories for news articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- File path: data/bookmarks.txt
- Format: pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields in order:
  1. bookmark_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. bookmarked_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores bookmarked articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- File path: data/comments.txt
- Format: pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields in order:
  1. comment_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. commenter_name (str)
  5. comment_text (str)
  6. comment_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores comments made on articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- File path: data/trending.txt
- Format: pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields in order:
  1. article_id (int)
  2. article_title (str)
  3. category (str)
  4. view_count (int)
  5. period (str)  # Example values: Today, This Week, This Month
- Description: Stores trending article data ranked by view counts and periods.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

---

*End of Design Specification Document*

# NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                        | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template File            | Context Variables (name: type)                                                                                                                                                      | Form Data (POST routes)                                             |
|---------------------------------|------------------------|-------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                               | redirect_to_dashboard  | GET         | N/A (redirect)            | None                                                                                                                                                                                | None                                                              |
| /dashboard                      | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html           | featured_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, excerpt:str)                                                                                      | None                                                              |
| /catalog                       | article_catalog        | GET         | article_catalog.html     | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, category:str), categories: list of dict (category_id:int, category_name:str)                               | None                                                              |
| /catalog/search                | search_results         | POST        | search_results.html      | query: str, results: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, excerpt:str)                                                                                                           | search_query: str (from input field named 'search_query')          |
| /article/<int:article_id>  | article_details        | GET         | article_details.html     | article: dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, content:str), is_bookmarked: bool                                                                                    | None                                                              |
| /article/<int:article_id>/bookmark | bookmark_article    | POST        | N/A (redirect back)      | None                                                                                                                                                                                | No form data; triggers bookmark action                            |
| /bookmarks                    | bookmarks              | GET         | bookmarks.html           | bookmarks: list of dict (bookmark_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, bookmarked_date:str)                                                                                   | None                                                              |
| /bookmark/<int:bookmark_id>/remove | remove_bookmark      | POST        | N/A (redirect back)      | None                                                                                                                                                                                | No form data; triggers bookmark removal                          |
| /comment                      | comments               | GET         | comments.html            | comments: list of dict (comment_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, commenter_name:str, comment_text:str, comment_date:str), articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str) | None                                                              |
| /comment/write                | write_comment          | GET         | write_comment.html       | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)                                                                                                                                  | None                                                              |
| /comment/write                | submit_comment         | POST        | N/A (redirect to /comment) | None                                                                                                                                                                              | article_id: int (dropdown), commenter_name: str (input), comment_text: str (textarea) |
| /trending                    | trending_articles      | GET         | trending.html            | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int), time_period: str                                                                 | None                                                              |
| /trending/filter             | filter_trending        | POST        | trending.html            | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int), time_period: str                                                               | time_period: str (dropdown selection)                             |
| /category/<category_name>    | category_articles      | GET         | category.html            | category_name: str, articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)                                                                                      | None                                                              |
| /category/<category_name>/sort | sort_category_articles | POST        | category.html            | category_name: str, sort_by: str ("date" or "popularity"), articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)                                          | sort_by: str (indicates sorting from button clicked)              |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. Dashboard Page
- File Path: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): News Portal
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page (Div): Container for the dashboard page
  - ID: featured-articles (Div): Display of featured article recommendations
  - ID: browse-articles-button (Button): Navigates to Article Catalog page
  - ID: view-bookmarks-button (Button): Navigates to Bookmarks page
  - ID: trending-articles-button (Button): Navigates to Trending Articles page
- Context Variables:
  - featured_articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), excerpt (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-articles-button: url_for('article_catalog')
  - view-bookmarks-button: url_for('bookmarks')
  - trending-articles-button: url_for('trending_articles')

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- File Path: templates/article_catalog.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Catalog
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page (Div): Container for the catalog page
  - ID: search-input (Input): Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords
  - ID: category-filter (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter by category
  - ID: articles-grid (Div): Grid displaying article cards
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} (Button): Button to view article details for each article
- Context Variables:
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), category (str), thumbnail_url (str)
  - categories (list of dict): Each with category_id (int), category_name (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)

### 3. Article Details Page
- File Path: templates/article_details.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Details
- Elements:
  - ID: article-details-page (Div): Container for article details
  - ID: article-title (H1): Displays article title
  - ID: article-author (Div): Displays article author
  - ID: article-date (Div): Displays article publication date
  - ID: bookmark-button (Button): Button to bookmark the article
  - ID: article-content (Div): Displays full article content
- Context Variables:
  - article (dict): Fields article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), content (str)
  - is_bookmarked (bool)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - bookmark-button: form POST to url_for('bookmark_article', article_id=article.article_id)

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- File Path: templates/bookmarks.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): My Bookmarks
- Elements:
  - ID: bookmarks-page (Div): Container for bookmarks page
  - ID: bookmarks-list (Div): List displaying all bookmarked articles
  - ID pattern: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (Button): Button to remove a bookmark
  - ID pattern: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (Button): Button to read bookmarked article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - bookmarks (list of dict): Each dict has bookmark_id (int), article_id (int), article_title (str), bookmarked_date (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: form POST to url_for('remove_bookmark', bookmark_id=bookmark_id)
  - read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 5. Comments Page
- File Path: templates/comments.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Comments
- Elements:
  - ID: comments-page (Div): Container for comments page
  - ID: comments-list (Div): List of all comments
  - ID: write-comment-button (Button): Button to navigate to Write Comment page
  - ID: filter-by-article (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter comments by article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - comments (list of dict): Each dict has comment_id (int), article_id (int), article_title (str), commenter_name (str), comment_text (str), comment_date (str)
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - write-comment-button: url_for('write_comment')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 6. Write Comment Page
- File Path: templates/write_comment.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Write a Comment
- Elements:
  - ID: write-comment-page (Div): Container for write comment page
  - ID: select-article (Dropdown): Dropdown to select article to comment on
  - ID: commenter-name (Input): Field to input commenter name
  - ID: comment-text (Textarea): Field to write comment text
  - ID: submit-comment-button (Button): Button to submit comment
- Context Variables:
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - form POST to url_for('submit_comment')

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- File Path: templates/trending.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Trending Articles
- Elements:
  - ID: trending-page (Div): Container for trending articles page
  - ID: trending-list (Div): Ranked list of trending articles
  - ID: time-period-filter (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month)
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} (Button): Button to view article details
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - trending_articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), category (str), view_count (int), rank (int)
  - time_period (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 8. Category Page
- File Path: templates/category.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Category Articles
- Elements:
  - ID: category-page (Div): Container for category page
  - ID: category-title (H1): Displays category name
  - ID: category-articles (Div): List of articles in the category
  - ID: sort-by-date (Button): Button to sort articles by date
  - ID: sort-by-popularity (Button): Button to sort articles by popularity
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - category_name (str)
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), date (str), popularity (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - sort-by-date: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by='date'
  - sort-by-popularity: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by='popularity'
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 9. Search Results Page
- File Path: templates/search_results.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Search Results
- Elements:
  - ID: search-results-page (Div): Container for search results
  - ID: search-query-display (Div): Displays the search query
  - ID: results-list (Div): List of search results; may be empty
  - ID: no-results-message (Div): Message displayed when no results are found
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - query (str)
  - results (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), excerpt (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Articles Data
- File Path: data/articles.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. article_id (int)
  2. title (str)
  3. author (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. content (str)
  6. date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
  7. views (int)
- Description: Stores all news articles with details.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- File Path: data/categories.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
- Description: Stores categories for news articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- File Path: data/bookmarks.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. bookmark_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. bookmarked_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores bookmarked articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- File Path: data/comments.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. comment_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. commenter_name (str)
  5. comment_text (str)
  6. comment_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores comments made on articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- File Path: data/trending.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. article_id (int)
  2. article_title (str)
  3. category (str)
  4. view_count (int)
  5. period (str)  # e.g., Today, This Week, This Month
- Description: Stores trending article data ranked by view counts and time periods.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

---

*End of Design Specification Document*

# NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                        | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template File            | Context Variables (name: type)                                                                                                                                                      | Form Data (POST routes)                                             |
|---------------------------------|------------------------|-------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                               | redirect_to_dashboard  | GET         | N/A (redirect)            | None                                                                                                                                                                                | None                                                              |
| /dashboard                      | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html           | featured_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, excerpt:str)                                                                                      | None                                                              |
| /catalog                       | article_catalog        | GET         | article_catalog.html     | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, category:str), categories: list of dict (category_id:int, category_name:str)                               | None                                                              |
| /catalog/search                | search_results         | POST        | search_results.html      | query: str, results: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, excerpt:str)                                                                                                           | search_query: str (from input field named 'search_query')          |
| /article/<int:article_id>  | article_details        | GET         | article_details.html     | article: dict (article_id:int, title:str, author:str, date:str, content:str), is_bookmarked: bool                                                                                    | None                                                              |
| /article/<int:article_id>/bookmark | bookmark_article    | POST        | N/A (redirect back)      | None                                                                                                                                                                                | No form data; triggers bookmark action                            |
| /bookmarks                    | bookmarks              | GET         | bookmarks.html           | bookmarks: list of dict (bookmark_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, bookmarked_date:str)                                                                                   | None                                                              |
| /bookmark/<int:bookmark_id>/remove | remove_bookmark      | POST        | N/A (redirect back)      | None                                                                                                                                                                                | No form data; triggers bookmark removal                          |
| /comment                      | comments               | GET         | comments.html            | comments: list of dict (comment_id:int, article_id:int, article_title:str, commenter_name:str, comment_text:str, comment_date:str), articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str) | None                                                              |
| /comment/write                | write_comment          | GET         | write_comment.html       | articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str)                                                                                                                                  | None                                                              |
| /comment/write                | submit_comment         | POST        | N/A (redirect to /comment) | None                                                                                                                                                                              | article_id: int (dropdown), commenter_name: str (input), comment_text: str (textarea) |
| /trending                    | trending_articles      | GET         | trending.html            | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int), time_period: str                                                                 | None                                                              |
| /trending/filter             | filter_trending        | POST        | trending.html            | trending_articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, category:str, view_count:int, rank:int), time_period: str                                                               | time_period: str (dropdown selection)                             |
| /category/<category_name>    | category_articles      | GET         | category.html            | category_name: str, articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)                                                                                      | None                                                              |
| /category/<category_name>/sort | sort_category_articles | POST        | category.html            | category_name: str, sort_by: str ("date" or "popularity"), articles: list of dict (article_id:int, title:str, date:str, popularity:int)                                          | sort_by: str (indicates sorting from button clicked)              |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. Dashboard Page
- File Path: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): News Portal
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page (Div): Container for the dashboard page
  - ID: featured-articles (Div): Display of featured article recommendations
  - ID: browse-articles-button (Button): Navigates to Article Catalog page
  - ID: view-bookmarks-button (Button): Navigates to Bookmarks page
  - ID: trending-articles-button (Button): Navigates to Trending Articles page
- Context Variables:
  - featured_articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), excerpt (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-articles-button: url_for('article_catalog')
  - view-bookmarks-button: url_for('bookmarks')
  - trending-articles-button: url_for('trending_articles')

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- File Path: templates/article_catalog.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Catalog
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page (Div): Container for the catalog page
  - ID: search-input (Input): Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords
  - ID: category-filter (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter by category
  - ID: articles-grid (Div): Grid displaying article cards
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} (Button): Button to view article details for each article
- Context Variables:
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), category (str), thumbnail_url (str)
  - categories (list of dict): Each with category_id (int), category_name (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)

### 3. Article Details Page
- File Path: templates/article_details.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Details
- Elements:
  - ID: article-details-page (Div): Container for article details
  - ID: article-title (H1): Displays article title
  - ID: article-author (Div): Displays article author
  - ID: article-date (Div): Displays article publication date
  - ID: bookmark-button (Button): Button to bookmark the article
  - ID: article-content (Div): Displays full article content
- Context Variables:
  - article (dict): Fields article_id (int), title (str), author (str), date (str), content (str)
  - is_bookmarked (bool)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - bookmark-button: form POST to url_for('bookmark_article', article_id=article.article_id)

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- File Path: templates/bookmarks.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): My Bookmarks
- Elements:
  - ID: bookmarks-page (Div): Container for bookmarks page
  - ID: bookmarks-list (Div): List displaying all bookmarked articles
  - ID pattern: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (Button): Button to remove a bookmark
  - ID pattern: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (Button): Button to read bookmarked article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - bookmarks (list of dict): Each dict has bookmark_id (int), article_id (int), article_title (str), bookmarked_date (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: form POST to url_for('remove_bookmark', bookmark_id=bookmark_id)
  - read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 5. Comments Page
- File Path: templates/comments.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Article Comments
- Elements:
  - ID: comments-page (Div): Container for comments page
  - ID: comments-list (Div): List of all comments
  - ID: write-comment-button (Button): Button to navigate to Write Comment page
  - ID: filter-by-article (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter comments by article
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - comments (list of dict): Each dict has comment_id (int), article_id (int), article_title (str), commenter_name (str), comment_text (str), comment_date (str)
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - write-comment-button: url_for('write_comment')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 6. Write Comment Page
- File Path: templates/write_comment.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Write a Comment
- Elements:
  - ID: write-comment-page (Div): Container for write comment page
  - ID: select-article (Dropdown): Dropdown to select article to comment on
  - ID: commenter-name (Input): Field to input commenter name
  - ID: comment-text (Textarea): Field to write comment text
  - ID: submit-comment-button (Button): Button to submit comment
- Context Variables:
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - form POST to url_for('submit_comment')

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- File Path: templates/trending.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Trending Articles
- Elements:
  - ID: trending-page (Div): Container for trending articles page
  - ID: trending-list (Div): Ranked list of trending articles
  - ID: time-period-filter (Dropdown): Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month)
  - ID pattern: view-article-button-{article_id} (Button): Button to view article details
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - trending_articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), category (str), view_count (int), rank (int)
  - time_period (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-article-button-{article_id}: url_for('article_details', article_id=article_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 8. Category Page
- File Path: templates/category.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Category Articles
- Elements:
  - ID: category-page (Div): Container for category page
  - ID: category-title (H1): Displays category name
  - ID: category-articles (Div): List of articles in the category
  - ID: sort-by-date (Button): Button to sort articles by date
  - ID: sort-by-popularity (Button): Button to sort articles by popularity
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - category_name (str)
  - articles (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), date (str), popularity (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - sort-by-date: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by='date'
  - sort-by-popularity: form POST to url_for('sort_category_articles', category_name=category_name) with sort_by='popularity'
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 9. Search Results Page
- File Path: templates/search_results.html
- Page Title (for <title> and <h1>): Search Results
- Elements:
  - ID: search-results-page (Div): Container for search results
  - ID: search-query-display (Div): Displays the search query
  - ID: results-list (Div): List of search results; may be empty
  - ID: no-results-message (Div): Message displayed when no results are found
  - ID: back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - query (str)
  - results (list of dict): Each dict has article_id (int), title (str), excerpt (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Articles Data
- File Path: data/articles.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. article_id (int)
  2. title (str)
  3. author (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. content (str)
  6. date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
  7. views (int)
- Description: Stores all news articles with details.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- File Path: data/categories.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
- Description: Stores categories for news articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- File Path: data/bookmarks.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. bookmark_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. bookmarked_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores bookmarked articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- File Path: data/comments.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. comment_id (int)
  2. article_id (int)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. commenter_name (str)
  5. comment_text (str)
  6. comment_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores comments made on articles.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- File Path: data/trending.txt
- Format: Pipe-delimited (|)
- Fields (in order):
  1. article_id (int)
  2. article_title (str)
  3. category (str)
  4. view_count (int)
  5. period (str)  # e.g., Today, This Week, This Month
- Description: Stores trending article data ranked by view counts and time periods.
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

---

*End of Design Specification Document*

log.before:
# Testing Feedback for Flask Weather Forecast Application

## Functional Testing

- The Flask app was tested by running the main route handlers for dashboard, air_quality, alerts, and current_weather.
- The routes render templates correctly and include the expected page titles.
- Data loading functions were mocked with sample data for current weather, alerts, and forecasts, simulating the expected behavior.
- Navigation links in templates point to endpoints such as `location_search`, but the route `location_search` was not defined in the provided app.py code sample, causing a BuildError during template rendering, which indicates a missing route.
- Filtering in alerts page works as expected with filter parameters applied correctly.

## UI / UX Verification

- All expected element IDs specified in each template were present exactly as required.
- Page titles for all templates matched the expected content.
- Dynamic elements such as dropdown filters, buttons with dynamic ids, and data display fields had proper template variable usage and syntax.
- Navigation buttons and links are implemented as specified enabling movement between dashboard, search page, forecasts, alerts, and settings.

## Issues and Suggestions

1. **Missing Route `location_search`**
   - The dashboard and saved_locations templates use `url_for('location_search')` for buttons and links.
   - This endpoint is not defined in the backend routes, leading to URL BuildError and broken navigation.
   - Implement the route `location_search` to fix this.

2. **No Flask app runtime test (server start)**
   - Due to missing definitions and environment limitations, a full live server test was not executed.
   - Recommend adding tests for the settings page POST handling and other interactive features if implemented.

3. **Data Loading Functions**
   - The actual data loading from files could not be tested due to incomplete or obfuscated code.
   - Confirm data files exist and parsing logic is robust and handles errors gracefully.

4. **No JavaScript interactivity check**
   - Templates include inline onchange handlers for navigation; more sophisticated JS or Ajax features should be tested if added.

## Summary

The current backend and templates largely meet the specifications with correct rendering and UI elements.
The main critical missing piece is the backend route `location_search` required for navigation on some pages.
Once this is added and connected, the project should work as expected.

log.before:
# Testing Feedback for Weather Forecast Flask Application

## Functional Testing

- Routes tested: `/`, `/dashboard`, `/air_quality`, `/alerts`, `/current_weather`
- All tested routes render templates correctly and contain expected page titles.
- Filtering of alerts by severity and location works correctly based on URL parameters.
- Current weather page shows accurate mock data.
- Error found: The `dashboard.html` and some other templates use `url_for('location_search')` which causes a URL building error because `location_search` route is not implemented.

## UI/UX Verification

- All required HTML element IDs are present in each template as expected.
- Titles match expected content for all templates.
- Buttons, filters, and tables correctly use data bindings.
- Dropdowns and buttons have appropriate onchange handlers or href links for navigation.

## Issues and Recommendations

1. **Undefined Route `location_search`**
   - The templates use `url_for('location_search')` but the route is missing in the backend.
   - This breaks navigation from dashboard and saved_locations pages.
   - Adding this route and corresponding view is essential for a working app.

2. **Data loading implementation unclear**
   - The actual logic to load weather and alerts data from files is missing or incomplete.
   - Need to verify data file existence and format correctness in the real app.

3. **No form submission tests**
   - Settings and search forms are present in templates but not covered in backend or tested.
   - Implement and test POST request handlers for these functionalities.

4. **JavaScript**
   - Inline JavaScript navigation via dropdown onchange events is used; this is functional.
   - Consider adding progressive enhancement or JS error handling.

## Summary

The backend and frontend templates are mostly consistent,
but the missing route `location_search` causes functional failures in navigation.
This is the main blocker currently.

- Titles match expected content for all templates.

- Confirm data loading from files and error handling are robust in the backend.

- The backend logic and templates are mostly consistent and complete.
- The single critical missing route `location_search` prevents some navigation and template rendering.
- Fixing this and testing form submissions will provide a robust, usable system.

# Comprehensive Test Feedback for Weather Forecast Flask Application

## Functional Testing

1. Attempted to run main app routes `/dashboard`, `/air_quality`, `/alerts`, and `/current_weather` with mocked data.

4. Navigation tested indirectly; however, encountered critical route missing.

## UI/UX Verification

1. Verified all HTML element IDs specified in templates exist as required.
2. Page titles are consistent with specifications.
3. Buttons, dropdowns, and tables appear with correct IDs.
4. Templates use expected Jinja2 syntax and dynamic data binding correctly.

## Critical Issues

- **Missing Route `location_search`**:
  - The dashboard and saved_locations templates contain links referencing `url_for('location_search')`.
  - This endpoint is not implemented in the backend, causing `BuildError` during template rendering.
  - This is a critical navigation blocker.

## Recommendations

- Implement the `location_search` route in app.py to enable all navigation paths.
- Verify all form POST handlers exist (e.g., settings, search) and are tested.
- Confirm the data loading mechanisms from files are robust and handle errors gracefully.
- Consider adding unit tests and integration tests covering form submission and data updates.

## Summary

- The application has good frontend and backend alignment for data display and filtering.
- The missing backend route `location_search` prevents full testing of navigation flows.
- After fixing this and expanding test coverage around forms and data, the app should be reliable.
